character.name: 기병 (Cavalry)
character.prompt: Cute chibi-style ancient Chinese cavalry soldier. Wearing light green and brown leather armor with a pointed helmet. Holding a long spear. Fast and agile mounted warrior on foot. Adorable chibi proportions.
